title: stipa semibarbata var. campylachne
intro: Stipa semibarbata var. campylachne, also known as the feather grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stipa semibarbata var. campylachne include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce pain and fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots, which can be made into teas or infusions, or processed into pills and powders for medicinal use.
